html:
Exclusive to:

Plain Omelettes are a Meat food exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be cooked in a Crock Pot by using at least 3.0 units of Eggs. This requires using either 3 Eggs, or a single Tallbird Egg.

In the event a single Tallbird Egg is used, adding 1.0 units of Vegetables will instead create Tall Scotch Eggs. If using three Eggs, removing at least one of them and using any kind of vegetable and any kind of Meats will instead create Pierogi. If any kind of Meat is used, replacing one of the Eggs with virtually any non-Twig filler will instead create Meatballs.

While not a particularly flashy food, they can function well as a staple food source and slightly less filling alternative to Meatballs if in a situation where the only reliable source of food is Monster Meat; converting 3 Monster Meat into Eggs and using a single Twig as filler can allow one to mass produce Plain Omelettes for relatively cheap.

Recipe

x3.0

Examples

×3

×3

×3

Adding at least 1.0 Vegetable value will result in Tall Scotch Eggs, a much better food

Gallery

  • HD Plain Omelette as seen in the in-game Cookbook.

If any kind of Meat is used, replacing one of the Eggs with virtually any non-Twig filler will instead create Meatballs.

'''Plain Omelettes''' are a Meat food exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be cooked in a [[Crock Pot]] by using at least 3.0 units of [[Eggs]]. This requires using either 3 [[Egg]]s, or a single [[Tallbird Egg]].

In the event a single Tallbird Egg is used, adding 1.0 units of [[Vegetables]] will instead create [[Tall Scotch Eggs]]. If using three Eggs, removing at least one of them and using any kind of vegetable and any kind of [[Meats]] will instead create [[Pierogi]]. If any kind of Meat is used, replacing one of the Eggs with virtually any non-Twig filler will instead create [[Meatballs]].

While not a particularly flashy food, they can function well as a staple food source and slightly less filling alternative to [[Meatballs]] if in a situation where the only reliable source of food is [[Monster Meat]]; converting 3 Monster Meat into Eggs and using a single [[Twig]] as filler can allow one to mass produce Plain Omelettes for relatively cheap.
